compile_shader_zero_copy._note: Phase 4 compile_shader fast-path: ON=TRITON_MSL_COMPILE_SHADER=1 (default), OFF=0. Measured 2026-06-14 on M4 Max (peak 546 GB/s). Reduction is pass-1 scatter-sum (each block→OUT[pid]), not global atomic.

flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32.name: flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32
flash_attention_simdgroup_fp32._note: DESIGN PROJECTION from 2026-06-20-simdgroup-flash-attention.md plan spec — NOT a live benchmark measurement. Numbers are plan-target projections based on simdgroup-matrix FLOPs and in-repo matmul-template peak (~11.4 TFLOP/s fp32). No hw_harness FA benchmark file exists yet. Correctness is verified (differential gate + torch parity, 12 cases all pass). Hardware: M4 Max.
